game_info.title: "Gather Basic Materials",
game_info.concept: **ドラゴンクエストビルダーズ　アレフガルドを復活せよ (Dragon Quest Builders):** Players explore a block-based 3D world, navigating with a virtual joystick and interacting with the environment through taps. The core loop involves destroying blocks by long-tapping with a dedicated cursor to gather raw materials, then using these materials to craft tools, items, and construct structures on a grid system. Story progression is driven by accepting quests from NPCs, which often require building specific rooms, defending settlements from monster attacks in real-time combat, or defeating boss enemies. Players place blocks with a single tap, utilizing an "Undo" button for corrections and a "Dokkan Hammer" for area-of-effect destruction, to rebuild the ruined world of Alefgard. New crafting recipes, advanced tools, and decorative items like "resident figures" are unlocked by completing quests or exchanging collected "dots" at a vendor, while the "Island of Awakening" provides a free-build sandbox mode that expands with new content.
game_info.description: Welcome to Dragon Quest Builders! You are a legendary builder tasked with restoring the ruined world of Alefgard. Explore a block-based world, gather materials by breaking blocks, craft tools and items, and construct buildings to complete quests. Defend your settlement from monster attacks and unlock new recipes as you progress. Complete quests to restore the land and prove yourself as the ultimate builder!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move player around the world
Space: Break block (hold to break, releases materials) / Attack enemy
Z: Place block from inventory / Interact with NPCs
Shift: Open/Close crafting menu (when available)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and material gathering test. Validates that the player can move around the world and break blocks to collect materials.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player character in all directions to explore the accessible area. Approach different block types and break them to gather various materials. Check that materials are added to inventory correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves in all directions, breaks multiple blocks of different types, and accumulates materials in their inventory. No crashes or stuck states occur during basic exploration.

TEST_2.test_description: Complete quest test to achieve win condition. Tests the full gameplay loop: gathering materials, crafting items, building structures, and completing quest objectives to win the game.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Gather essential materials by breaking blocks systematically. Craft required tools and items. Build the structures needed to complete the main quest. Defeat any monsters that spawn. Complete all quest objectives efficiently.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player successfully completes all required quest objectives, including gathering materials, crafting items, building structures, and defending against monsters. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state when all quests are complete.
